investorValue.subtitle: Investor Benefits
investorValue.title: Why Invest in UAE Real Estate?
investorValue.description: The UAE offers one of the world's most attractive environments for real estate investment. With strong rental yields, capital appreciation potential, and a business-friendly regulatory framework, Dubai continues to attract global investors.

invest.subtitle: Wealth Creation
invest.title: Wealth Creation Through Real Estate
invest.description: Strategic investment advisory designed for individuals seeking capital growth and passive income through UAE real estate.
invest.yieldsDesc: Dubai offers 6-8% average rental yields—among the highest globally for prime real estate markets.
invest.appreciationDesc: Strategic locations show consistent 8-15% annual appreciation, driven by infrastructure and demand growth.
invest.visaDesc: Property investments of AED 2M+ qualify for the UAE Golden Visa—10-year residency for you and your family.
invest.calcDesc: Estimate your potential returns on a Dubai property investment.
invest.calcNote: Net ROI assumes ~15% deduction for maintenance, service charges, and vacancy.
invest.whyTaxDesc: Zero income tax, zero capital gains tax, and zero property tax on residential assets.
invest.whyYieldsDesc: Prime areas consistently deliver 6-8% gross yields, outperforming London and New York.
invest.whyStabilityDesc: World-class regulatory framework, strong rule of law, and transparent real estate processes.
invest.whyLifestyleDesc: Global connectivity, safety, and an unmatched quality of life attract talent and tenants alike.
invest.goldenVisaDesc: Invest AED 2 million or more in UAE real estate and secure a 10-year renewable residency visa for yourself and your family. Enjoy the benefits of living, working, and investing in one of the world's most dynamic economies.

about.subtitle: About Asas Invest
about.title: Curating Wealth Through Real Estate
about.heroDesc: We are not just brokers. We are your strategic partners in asset acquisition and portfolio management.
about.privateOfficeDesc: Asas operates like a family office for real estate, offering bespoke advisory services for High Net Worth Individuals. From portfolio structuring and off-market access to tax-efficient acquisition strategies, our Private Office delivers institutional-grade solutions with a personal touch.

buyerGuide.subtitle: Your Roadmap
buyerGuide.title: Buyer's Guide to UAE Real Estate
buyerGuide.intro: Purchasing property in the UAE is straightforward, but understanding the process ensures a smooth experience. Here's everything you need to know.
buyerGuide.step1Desc: Are you buying for personal use, rental income, or capital appreciation? Understanding your objective helps narrow the right property type, location, and budget.
buyerGuide.step2Desc: Freehold areas allow full ownership for foreign nationals. Leasehold areas offer long-term rights (typically 99 years). Your advisor will guide you to the right structure.
buyerGuide.step3Desc: Once you've selected a property, the process involves signing a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU), securing financing if needed, and completing the transfer at the Dubai Land Department.

careers.subtitle: Join Us
careers.title: Build Your Career at Asas Invest
careers.description: We're always looking for talented individuals who share our passion for real estate excellence and client-first thinking. If you're driven, ambitious, and ready to make an impact, we'd love to hear from you.
